info.name: Blinkit Clone API
info.description: All APIs for Blinkit Clone microservices backend. All requests go through API Gateway at http://localhost:8080

item.name: Auth Service
item.description: Authentication APIs — signup, login, token refresh, logout, password reset

request.description: Register a new user. Sends OTP to email. No JWT required.
Verify email using OTP received after signup.
Login and get JWT tokens. Automatically saves accessToken, refreshToken, userId to collection variables.
Get a new access token using refresh token. Automatically updates accessToken variable.
Logout — blacklists access token in Redis, deletes refresh token.
Hard deletes the authenticated user's own account. Publishes user.deleted Kafka event so user-service cleans up the profile. Requires valid JWT.
Sends password reset link to email.
Validate a password reset token before showing reset form.
Reset password using the token from email link.

item.name: User Service
item.description: User profile and delivery address management. All require JWT.

request.description: Get the authenticated user's profile.
Create or update user profile.
List all delivery addresses for the user.
Add a new delivery address. Saves addressId to variable.

body.raw:
{
  "label": "WORK",
  "recipientName": "Rahul Kumar",
  "recipientPhone": "9876543210",
  "flatNo": "Floor 3",
  "building": "Tech Park",
  "street": "Outer Ring Road",
  "area": "Bellandur",
  "city": "Bangalore",
  "state": "Karnataka",
  "pincode": "560103",
  "landmark": "Near Eco Space",
  "lat": 12.9279,
  "lng": 77.6771
}

request.description: Update an existing address.
Delete a delivery address.
Set an address as the default delivery address.

item.name: Product Service
item.description: Product catalog and category management. GET endpoints are public. Admin endpoints require ADMIN role JWT.

request.description: Get flat list of all categories. No JWT required.
Get categories as nested tree. No JWT required.
Create a new category. Requires ADMIN role. Saves categoryId to variable.
Create a child category under a parent.
Get paginated product list. No JWT required.
Full-text search on product name and tags.
Get products by category slug.
Get a single product by its ID.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Amul Full Cream Milk 500ml",
  "description": "Fresh full cream milk from Amul",
  "slug": "amul-full-cream-milk-500ml",
  "mrp": 30.0,
  "sellingPrice": 28.0,
  "categoryId": "{{categoryId}}",
  "unit": "500ml",
  "tags": [
    "milk",
    "dairy",
    "amul"
  ],
  "images": [
    "https://example.com/milk.jpg"
  ]
}

request.description: Create a new product. Requires ADMIN role. Saves productId to variable.
Update an existing product. Requires ADMIN role.
Toggle product active/inactive status. Requires ADMIN role.
Delete a product. Requires ADMIN role.
Get stock levels for a product.
Get stock levels for all products. Requires ADMIN role.
Set stock quantity for a product. Requires ADMIN role.
Reserve stock for an order (moves available → reserved).
Release reserved stock back to available (order cancelled).
Confirm stock deduction after payment (removes from reserved).

item.name: Coupon Service
item.description: Coupon management APIs — admin CRUD, public active coupons listing

request.description: Create a new coupon. ADMIN role required. Types: FLAT, PERCENT, FIRST_ORDER, FREE_DELIVERY. validFrom/validUntil must be ISO-8601 with Z suffix.
Get all coupons (paginated). ADMIN role required.
Get a single coupon by its MongoDB ID. ADMIN role required.
Update coupon fields (partial update supported). ADMIN role required.
Delete a coupon by ID. ADMIN role required.
Get usage stats for a coupon (totalUsed, usageLimit, remaining). ADMIN role required.
Get all currently active and valid coupons. No authentication required.
Validates a coupon code. Note: returns a plain object (not ApiResponse wrapper): {valid, discountAmount, message, freeDelivery}. Used by cart-service internally.

item.name: Cart Service
item.description: Cart management APIs — add/update/remove items, apply promo codes, view cart summary

request.description: Get full cart summary: items, itemsTotal, deliveryFee, couponDiscount, totalAmount. Live availability check on each item.
Get total number of items (sum of quantities) in cart.
Add a product to cart. Max 10 units per item. Price is snapshotted at add-time. Returns updated cart.
Update quantity of an existing cart item. Set quantity=0 to remove item.
Remove a specific product from cart.
Apply a promo/coupon code to the cart. Validates minimum order amount, expiry, usage limits. Returns updated cart with discount applied.
Remove the currently applied promo code from cart.
Clear all items and promo code from cart.

item.name: Health Checks
item.description: Actuator health endpoints for all services

item.name: Payment Service
item.description: Wallet & transaction APIs. All requests go through the API Gateway. Wallet is auto-created on user signup with ₹10,000 bonus.

request.description: Get the logged-in customer's wallet balance and details.
Paginated list of transactions for the logged-in user.
Fetch a specific transaction by ID. Returns 403 if transaction belongs to another user.
Admin: get all user wallets paginated. Requires ADMIN role.
Admin: get wallet for a specific userId. Requires ADMIN role.
Admin: add funds to a user wallet. Requires ADMIN role.
Admin: create a wallet with ₹10,000 signup bonus for a user who registered before payment-service existed. Idempotent — skips if wallet already exists.
Admin: all transactions across all users, sorted by latest first. Requires ADMIN role.

item.name: Order Service
item.description: Order placement, tracking, and management. Cart must have items before placing an order. Payment is debited atomically from wallet.

request.description: Place a new order from the current cart. Reserves stock, debits wallet atomically. Order starts as PAYMENT_PROCESSING → moves to CONFIRMED via Kafka payment.success event. Pre-requisite: add items to cart first.
Get paginated list of orders for the logged-in user, sorted by latest first.
Get a specific order by orderId. Returns 404 if not found or belongs to another user.
Cancel an order. Only allowed for statuses: PAYMENT_PENDING, CONFIRMED, PACKED. Triggers order.cancelled Kafka event → payment-service refunds wallet, inventory releases stock.
Admin: get all orders across all users, sorted by latest first. Requires ADMIN role.
Admin: manually update order status. Valid statuses: PAYMENT_PENDING, PAYMENT_PROCESSING, PAYMENT_FAILED, CONFIRMED, PACKED, OUT_FOR_DELIVERY, DELIVERED, CANCELLED. Requires ADMIN role.

item.name: Delivery Service
item.description: Stage 6 — Delivery Service (port 8088). Manage delivery partners, tasks, tracking. Agent/Admin role APIs.

request.description: Admin-only. Creates auth credentials for a delivery agent (DELIVERY_AGENT role). No OTP — account is verified immediately. Returns userId to use when registering partner profile.
Delivery agent registers their profile (name, phone, vehicle). Must be logged in as DELIVERY_AGENT. vehicleType: BICYCLE | MOTORCYCLE | SCOOTER | CAR.
Get the logged-in delivery agent's profile. Requires DELIVERY_AGENT role.
Update partner's own profile. Requires DELIVERY_AGENT role.
Toggle partner's availability (available/unavailable). Requires DELIVERY_AGENT role.
Update partner's current GPS coordinates. Requires DELIVERY_AGENT role.
Get all delivery tasks assigned to the logged-in partner. Requires DELIVERY_AGENT role.

Update task status. Valid transitions: ASSIGNED→PICKED_UP, PICKED_UP→OUT_FOR_DELIVERY, OUT_FOR_DELIVERY→DELIVERED. FAILED allowed from ASSIGNED/PICKED_UP/OUT_FOR_DELIVERY (requires failureReason). Triggers Kafka event → order-service updates order status. Requires DELIVERY_AGENT role.
Mark a task as FAILED. failureReason is required. Allowed from ASSIGNED, PICKED_UP, or OUT_FOR_DELIVERY.
Track delivery status for a specific order. Any authenticated user can call this. Returns task status, partner location, store location, timestamps.
Admin: list all delivery tasks, optionally filtered by status (UNASSIGNED, ASSIGNED, PICKED_UP, OUT_FOR_DELIVERY, DELIVERED, FAILED, CANCELLED). Paginated.
Admin: get details of a specific delivery task by taskId.
Admin: assign a delivery partner to an UNASSIGNED task. Task moves to ASSIGNED status. estimatedDeliveryMinutes is optional.
Admin: list all registered delivery partners. Paginated.
Admin: get a specific delivery partner's details by partnerId (same UUID as auth userId).
Admin: toggle a delivery partner's active status (activate/deactivate). Inactive partners cannot receive new tasks.
